chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-1016 / 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE. 1) For orders on Misc. No. 5393/2025. 2) For orders on office objection No. 01 & 22. 3) For orders on Misc. No. 5394/2025. 4) For orders on Misc. No. 5395/2025. 5) For hearing of main case. 12.03.2025. M/s. Imran Iqbal Khan, Aneel Zia & Saima Syed, Advocates for Petitioner. ________________ 1) Granted. 2) To be satisfied before the next date of hearing. 3) Granted subject to all exceptions. 4 & 5) At the very outset, learned Counsel for the Petitioner submits that the controversy as raised in this Petition regarding Suspension of License of the Petitioner without a notice has already been decided by this Bench on 11.02.2025 in C. P. No. D-466 of 2025 and other connected Petitions whereby, the Petitions have been allowed and the suspension orders have been suspended. Let notice be issued to the Respondents as well as DAG for 19.03.2025. Till then, the impugned Circular dated 01.02.2025 available at Page 27 shall remain suspended. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE J U D G E Arshad/
